mapper.select: SELECT od.name AS itemName, SUM(od.number) AS salesCount, IFNULL(SUM(od.amount), 0) AS salesAmount FROM order_detail od INNER JOIN orders o ON od.order_id = o.id WHERE o.status = 5 AND o.order_time >= #{begin} AND o.order_time < #{end} GROUP BY od.name ORDER BY salesCount DESC, salesAmount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
